summary: Phase 9: Rich Analytics and Strategy Performance Dashboard - 17/17 backend tests passed (100%), all frontend UI tests passed. Analytics page at /analytics with 4 tabs (Overview, Strategies, Execution, Charts) working correctly with proper data-testid attributes.

minor.issue: Unused variable pos_pnl assigned but never used (F841)

backend_api_tests: POST /api/test/inject-trades - creates ~50+ synthetic trades across 10 days for arb_scanner and crypto_sniper
GET /api/analytics/summary - returns portfolio summary with total_pnl, win_rate, sharpe_ratio, max_drawdown, profit_factor, expectancy, etc.
GET /api/analytics/summary (empty) - returns valid JSON with zeros/nulls when no trades
GET /api/analytics/strategies - returns per-strategy metrics for arb_scanner and crypto_sniper
GET /api/analytics/strategies (empty) - returns empty dict when no trades
GET /api/analytics/execution-quality - returns fill quality (total_orders, filled_count, fill_ratio, avg_latency_ms) and slippage metrics
GET /api/analytics/execution-quality (empty) - returns valid structure when no orders
GET /api/analytics/timeseries - returns daily_pnl, equity_curve, drawdown_curve, trade_frequency, rolling_7d_pnl, rolling_30d_pnl, executions_by_strategy
GET /api/analytics/timeseries (empty) - returns valid JSON with correct keys (rolling_7d_pnl, rolling_30d_pnl, drawdown_curve, executions_by_strategy) when empty
Timeseries daily_pnl structure verified (date, pnl, trades)
Timeseries executions_by_strategy verified - contains arb_scanner and crypto_sniper entries
frontend_ui_tests: Analytics page loads at /analytics with data-testid='analytics-page'
4 tabs visible: Overview, Strategies, Execution, Charts
Overview tab: 6 StatCards (Total P&L, Win Rate, Profit Factor, Sharpe Ratio, Max Drawdown, Expectancy)
Overview tab: P&L Curve chart with data-testid='analytics-pnl-chart'
Overview tab: P&L Breakdown section with data-testid='section-pnl-breakdown'
Overview tab: Win/Loss Analysis section with data-testid='section-winloss'
Overview tab: Empty state message when no trades
Strategies tab: Per-strategy cards for arb_scanner and crypto_sniper with data-testid='section-strat-{id}'
Strategies tab: Shows P&L, trade count, win rate, profit factor, expectancy, sharpe, avg edge, volume, fees
Execution tab: Fill Quality section with data-testid='section-fill-quality'
Execution tab: Slippage & Rejections section with data-testid='section-slippage'
Charts tab: Rolling 7D/30D P&L stats, Days Traded, Avg Daily P&L
Charts tab: Daily P&L bar chart with green/red bars
Charts tab: Drawdown area chart with data-testid='section-drawdown-chart'
Charts tab: Trade Frequency bar chart with data-testid='section-trade-freq'
Sidebar nav-analytics item present with correct data-testid

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: analytics_service.py line 110 has unused variable pos_pnl - can be removed
fixes_applied: Added TrendingUp icon import to Sidebar.jsx for Analytics nav item
seed_data_creation: Test trades can be injected via POST /api/test/inject-trades and cleared via POST /api/test/clear-trades
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 9 Analytics Dashboard complete. KEY FEATURES: (1) POST /api/test/inject-trades creates ~50+ synthetic trades across 10 days for arb_scanner and crypto_sniper strategies plus matching orders. (2) GET /api/analytics/summary returns portfolio metrics including total_pnl, realized_pnl, unrealized_pnl, win_rate, sharpe_ratio, max_drawdown, profit_factor, expectancy, avg_win, avg_loss, streaks. (3) GET /api/analytics/strategies returns per-strategy breakdown with same metrics. (4) GET /api/analytics/execution-quality returns fill quality metrics (total_orders, filled_count, fill_ratio, avg_latency_ms) and slippage metrics. (5) GET /api/analytics/timeseries returns daily_pnl array, equity_curve array, drawdown_curve array, trade_frequency array, rolling_7d_pnl, rolling_30d_pnl, executions_by_strategy dict. (6) Frontend /analytics page has 4 tabs (Overview, Strategies, Execution, Charts) all with proper data-testid attributes. Empty state handled correctly - shows appropriate messages when no trades exist. BUG FIX from previous iteration: compute_timeseries empty-state now returns correct keys (rolling_7d_pnl not rolling_7d, includes drawdown_curve and executions_by_strategy).
